public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as academic and recordkeeping steward.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a academic and recordkeeping steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of academic and recordkeeping steward in and around Harvest Circle, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Harvest Circle workable through the obligations of academic and recordkeeping steward while managing the immediate pressure of spoilage in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Harvest Circle, that usually means carrying spoilage, price pressure, favor feuds without letting the role of academic and recordkeeping steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Farlan Inkshade needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Harvest Circle.
Farlan Inkshade can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Farlan Inkshade communicates in public. In Harvest Circle, this lands inside a public field already shaped by harvest stewards, quota clerks.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Harvest Circle: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

first_impression: Farlan Inkshade presents as Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a academic and recordkeeping steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Academic and recordkeeping steward, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Farlan Inkshade refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Academic and recordkeeping steward too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Farlan Inkshade can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Farlan Inkshade adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Farlan Inkshade is Known locally through day-to-day work as academic and recordkeeping steward. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Academic and recordkeeping steward.
